objective: A/B retest PM regime-target exposure rule in rebound window after fixing RiskGuard sector map.

variables.custom: Only PM_EXPERIMENT_MODE changes to regime_target_exposure. RiskGuard sector map is fixed so sector limits no longer bucket the pool as Other.

fixed_indicators.description: Fixed trend snapshot: close, SMA20/SMA60, MACD, RSI14.
Fixed momentum/risk snapshot: 5d/10d/20d returns and 20d volatility.
